name: Codfish Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the salt codfish with cold water. Let it stand several hours, then drain.
2. Add the sliced potatoes to a pot of water and cook until tender.
3. Drain the potatoes and mash them.
4. Add the thin cream, butter, and well-beaten egg yolks to the mashed potatoes. Beat until light.
5. Season with pepper and salt to taste.
6. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
7. Pour the mixture into a hot frying pan containing melted butter.
8. Cook until brown on the bottom.
9. Fold the omelet like an omelet and serve immediately. Serves 8.
